'''Qretu 5''' was a [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] refinement [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim's]] [[Qretu system/Legends|Qretu system]], loyal to [[Ysanne Isard]] during the [[Bacta War]].

The planet hosted the [[Q5A7 Bacta Refinement Plant]], which was [[Battle of Qretu 5|destroyed]] by a punitive strike conducted by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] soon after the [[Battle of Halanit]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}}
